# Pitch My CV
> AI-assisted resume optimization platform with an ATS checker, resume examples, role-specific career guides, and keyword optimization resources for job seekers.

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://pitchcv.app/): Match a resume to a target job and identify missing keywords, weak structure, and ATS risks.
- [Pricing](https://pitchcv.app/pricing): Plans for ATS scans, AI resume optimization, job tailoring, and export features.
- [ATS Resume Checker](https://pitchcv.app/tools/ats-checker): Free ATS-focused resume checker and scanner.

## Career Guides
- [Career Guides Hub](https://pitchcv.app/careers): Role-specific resume guides and recruiter-oriented advice.
- [Software Engineer Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/software-engineer-resume): ATS and recruiter guidance for software engineering resumes.
- [Product Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/product-manager-resume): Resume guidance for PM roles.
- [Marketing Manager Resume Guide](https://pitchcv.app/careers/marketing-manager-resume): Resume guidance for marketing leadership roles.

## Examples and Resources
- [Resume Examples](https://pitchcv.app/examples): Example resume pages by role.
- [ATS Resume Checklist](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-checklist): Checklist for ATS-safe resume structure and quality control.
- [ATS Resume Mistakes](https://pitchcv.app/ats-resume-mistakes): Common ATS failures and fixes.
- [Resume Keyword Optimization](https://pitchcv.app/resume-keyword-optimization): Guide for extracting, prioritizing, and placing resume keywords naturally.

## Trust and Legal
- [About](https://pitchcv.app/about): Company mission, editorial standards, trust signals, and operating principles.
- [Contact](https://pitchcv.app/contact): Support, privacy, and partnership contact points.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pitchcv.app/privacy): Privacy commitments and data handling.
- [Public Offer](https://pitchcv.app/terms): Subscription and usage terms.
- [Data Processing](https://pitchcv.app/data-processing): Data processing policy and retention details.

## Contact
- Support: mailto:support@pitchmycv.com
- Privacy: mailto:privacy@pitchmycv.com
- Partnerships: mailto:partnerships@pitchmycv.com
